title: • Letter 3 = Third letter from snapshot +2.
content:
• Letter 3 = Third letter from snapshot +2.
• If sequential Level 3s appear, only Letter 3 increments by +1.

🔹 Level 3 → Level 2:
• Letter 1 = Stays the same.
• Letter 2 = Third letter from snapshot +1.
• Letter 3 = Third letter from snapshot +2.

🔹 Level 2 → Level 1:
• Letter 1 = Stays the same.
• Letter 2 = Stays the same.
• Letter 3 = Stays the same.
• Iteration number is appended: -01, -02, etc.

🚀 FINAL CONFIRMATION

✅ This document now contains ALL rules and logic for the naming structure.
✅ You can apply it to any computing system and regenerate identical results.
✅ Snapshots ensure proper letter inheritance across all levels.
✅ Universal numbering system maintains continuity and allows insertions.

🚨 Is this fully correct before committing? 🚨
context: From document: 📜 FINALIZED RULES FOR THE NAMING STRUCTURE & UNIVERSAL SYSTEM — chunk 6 (chunk 6/6)
